'''Cliff Rakerd''' was a voice actor in the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio drama version of ''Crimson Empire'']].<ref name="Crimson Empire">[[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'' audio drama]]</ref> Rakerd also voiced [[Picaroon C. Boodle|Pic]] and [[WeeGee]] in ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)]]''.<ref name="Rebel Agent" />
